__comment.what: TEMPLATE ONLY — do not commit real secrets.
steps: Copy this file to dressed-android/app/google-services.json (same folder as the app module build.gradle.kts).
Remove the entire '__comment' object from the copy (required for a clean google-services.json).
Either replace every YOUR_* / placeholder below, or (recommended) download google-services.json from Firebase Console after registering the Android app.
